image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about mirages than social media does.
Context visual: Ever seen water on a hot road? That’s a mirage, but it’s not what it seems.
Escalation visual: Mirages happen due to light bending through layers of air with different temperatures.
Evidence visual: That’s called refraction! It tricks our brains into seeing things that aren’t really there.
Payoff visual: So when you think you see water, it’s actually an illusion shaped by the heat.
Cta visual: Curious about other amazing science facts? Hit that follow button for more!
